name: IFTTT
highlight_text: What it automates best - social posting.
description:
What IFTTT Does

IFTTT (If This Then That) allows you to easily connect different social media management tools and automate tasks between them. With IFTTT, you can create Applets, an automated workflow that automatically repost content from your client's website to any social platform. 

This saves time by allowing one post to be shared on multiple platforms based on a schedule. 

IFTTT also lets you automatically archive social media analytics and engagements data to Google Sheets or Airtable for reporting purposes. 

Key Features 

  • IFTTT can cross-post to different networks. 
  • The tool can auto-archive social analytics. 
  • Integrates with other websites. 

Benefits of IFTTT

  • IFTTT can automate several repetitive social media tasks
  • Its integration with other management tools gives you access to full-fledged campaign tracking capabiities. 
  • IFTTT can help you maximize the reach and value of your existing content by consistently replicating posts. 

Pricing

  • $12.50 monthly. 

Pros

  • It is affordable.
  • Saves time.

Cons

  • A limited number of free automation features available per month.
